name: notch
description: Notch (notch.one) Builder 2026.1 scene authoring via the in-Notch JavaScript API — node creation, wiring, property setting, plus a CLI to look up any of 651 nodes' properties.

prerequisites.name: node
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Node.js from https://nodejs.org/ — needed for the notch-node-info.js property-lookup CLI.

install.notes: No third-party software to install. Notch Builder itself is licensed from notch.one and is the user's responsibility. This skill assumes Builder 2026.1 is installed and the user can open it.

integration_test.description: Confirms the property-lookup CLI can fetch and parse a node doc page from the Notch manual.

post_install_hints: Notch's JS API cannot save .dfx files or open projects — scenes are built by writing a .js file that Notch loads via a Javascript Node. See SKILL.md §Workflow for the one-time setup.
Logs at C:/Users/<USER>/Documents/Notch/Logs/ (Windows) or equivalent. The most recently modified notch_log__*.txt is the live session.

Official Notch Manual MCP server (https://mcp-manual.notch.one/) is registered as 'notch-manual'. Use it for docs lookup before writing any node code. The bundled notch-node-info.js CLI is a local fallback.
